D:\msys2\mingw64\bin\arm-none-eabi-gcc.exe -g -pipe -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mthumb -mthumb-interwork -mfloat-abi=hard -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -TC:/Users/ganjingshu/Desktop/frame1/STM32F407IGHx_FLASH.ld -lm -lc -Wl,--gc-sections -flto -specs=nano.specs -Wl,-Map=C:/Users/ganjingshu/Desktop/frame1/basic_framework.map -Wl,--cref -Wl,--print-memory-usage @CMakeFiles\basic_framework.elf.dir\objects1.rsp -o basic_framework.elf   -LC:\Users\ganjingshu\Desktop\frame1\Middlewares\ST\ARM\DSP\Lib  -lCMSISDSP -lm
